extDescription.message: View Markdown files as a clean PDF-style document and print them from the browser.

localMarkdownMissing.message: Local Markdown was not found. Select the file again from the popup.

githubMarkdownRequired.message: Open a Markdown file (.md) on GitHub before using this extension.

unsupportedMarkdownUrl.message: This URL is not supported. Use a GitHub Markdown file, raw GitHub Markdown, or a direct Markdown HTTP/HTTPS URL.

urlHelpText.message: GitHub .md files, raw GitHub Markdown, or direct Markdown HTTP/HTTPS URLs are supported.

errorInvalidUrl.message: Check the URL format. Do not include credentials or non-HTTP schemes.

errorUnsupportedUrl.message: Open a Markdown file (.md) on GitHub before using this extension.

errorNetwork.message: Could not fetch Markdown. Check your internet connection or URL.

errorTimeout.message: Fetching Markdown timed out. Try again later.

errorHttp.message: Could not fetch Markdown because the server returned an error.

errorNotFound.message: Markdown file was not found. Check the URL, branch name, and file name.

errorAccessDenied.message: This file cannot be accessed. Private repositories are not currently supported.

errorNotMarkdown.message: A web page was returned instead of a Markdown file. Specify a .md file URL.

errorTooLarge.message: This Markdown file is larger than the 10 MB limit.

onboardingTitle.message: Turn Markdown into a printable PDF-style page.

onboardingIntro.message: Open GitHub Markdown, URL Markdown, or a local file and save it as PDF from the print screen.

onboardingStepGithub.message: Open a .md or .markdown file on GitHub.

onboardingStepButton.message: Press the PDF View button shown on the page.

onboardingStepPopup.message: You can also open URLs and local files from the extension icon.

onboardingStepPrint.message: Use the print screen to save as PDF.
